introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 把输入映射为输出的规则。

views.name: Information
views.definition: A quantity measuring how much data or a likelihood constrains a parameter.
views.definition_zh: 衡量数据或似然函数对参数约束程度的量。

introduced_concepts.name: Mean Trait Value
introduced_concepts.definition: The population average of the trait value across all classes or individuals.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 群体中性状值的平均水平。

introduced_concepts.name: Coefficient
introduced_concepts.definition: A scalar multiplier that controls the size of a term in the formula.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 控制公式中某一项大小的乘数。

introduced_concepts.name: Trait Value
introduced_concepts.definition: The numerical value of the phenotype or quantitative trait being modeled.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 表型或数量性状在模型中的数值。

views.name: Response
views.definition: The change in mean trait value observed after inheritance or transmission.
views.definition_zh: 遗传或传递之后观察到的平均性状值变化。
